headings.text: For those who shape spaces, not just decorate them.
Started with the desire to create something real.
Create it yourself: Your pixels. Your expression.

buttons.font: Helvetica, Arial, メイリオ, meiryo, "ヒラギノ角ゴ pro w3", "hiragino kaku gothic pro", sans-serif
